threats.statement: An internet-based attacker can inject malicious SQL queries via the search API, which leads to unauthorized data access
threats.threatAction: can inject malicious SQL queries via the search API
threats.threatImpact: which leads to unauthorized data access

threats.statement: An insider with access to the logging system can view sensitive user data in logs, which leads to information disclosure
threats.prerequisites: with access to the logging system
threats.threatAction: can view sensitive user data in logs

threats.statement: An external attacker can exploit a vulnerable dependency to execute arbitrary code, which leads to system compromise
threats.threatAction: can exploit a vulnerable dependency to execute arbitrary code

threats.statement: An attacker can steal exposed credentials from source code, which leads to unauthorized access to cloud resources
threats.threatAction: can steal exposed credentials from source code
threats.threatImpact: which leads to unauthorized access to cloud resources

threats.statement: An attacker can perform cross-site scripting via user input fields, which leads to session hijacking
threats.threatAction: can perform cross-site scripting via user input fields

mitigations.content: Use parameterized queries for all database access
Implement structured logging that redacts PII
Enable Dependabot and auto-merge patch updates
Set up pre-commit hooks with credential scanning
